creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This command returns an old date:
> $ curl -sI https://download.FreeBSD.org/ports/index/INDEX-13.bz2 | grep Last-Modified
> Last-Modified: Fri, 06 May 2022 01:25:17 GMT

It should be updated more frequently than that.


---References---
[1] Repology doesn't update the FreeBSD repository for 3+ days. (https://github.com/repology/repology-updater/issues/1245#issuecomment-1121508484)
